Title: Tenshinhan zekkyô!! Kore ga saigo no Kikôhô da
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: The battle with Nappa continues as Pikkoro and Kuririn try to ambush him while he fights Tenshinhan. Also, Kami-Sama senses that the end of his life is approaching, and Son Goku continues on Hebi no michi.
